title: Best Mechanical Keyboards
description: Daily-updated rankings of the best mechanical keyboards, scored on switch quality, build, features, latency, and value.

competitors.name: Keychron Q1 Pro
competitors.description: Wireless gasket-mount keyboard with QMK/Via support and aluminum build

competitors.name: Logitech G915 TKL
competitors.description: Slim wireless TKL with GL low-profile switches and multi-device pairing

competitors.name: SteelSeries Apex Pro TKL Wireless
competitors.description: Adjustable actuation OmniPoint 2.0 switches with 2.4GHz wireless at 40g actuation force

competitors.name: Corsair K100 AIR Wireless
competitors.description: Ultra-slim wireless mechanical with Cherry MX ULP Tactile switches

competitors.name: Ducky One 3
competitors.description: Hot-swappable with double-shot PBT keycaps and multiple Cherry/Kailh switch options

competitors.name: Keychron K8 Pro
competitors.description: TKL wireless with QMK/Via, hot-swap, and RGB at entry-level price

competitors.name: NuPhy Air75 V2
competitors.description: Ultra-slim 75% wireless with low-profile Gateron switches and Mac/Win compatibility

competitors.name: ASUS ROG Strix Scope II RX
competitors.description: ROG RX optical switches with IP56 water resistance and XLarge Space key

competitors.name: HyperX Alloy Origins Core
competitors.description: Full-aluminum TKL with HyperX Red linear switches and RGB at budget price

competitors.name: Razer BlackWidow V4 Pro
competitors.description: Wireless full-size with Razer Yellow V3 analog-optical switches and Chroma RGB

competitors.name: Wooting 60HE+
competitors.description: Hall-effect analog switch keyboard with Rapid Trigger at 0.1mm resolution

competitors.name: Mountain Everest Max
competitors.description: Modular full-size with detachable numpad, hot-swap, and magnetic wrist rest

history.commentary:
機械鍵盤市場在 2026 年以「模擬開關」（Analog / Hall-Effect Switch）技術為最大亮點。Wooting 60HE+ 以其霍爾效應磁性開關和 Rapid Trigger 功能（可設定低至 0.1mm 的觸發點）奪得第一名——這項技術讓玩家能在毫秒內取消並重新觸發按鍵，在射擊遊戲中帶來革命性優勢。SteelSeries Apex Pro TKL Wireless 同樣支援可調節觸發點，但其 QMK/Via 客製化空間不如 Wooting，排名第三。

Keychron Q1 Pro 以其出色的鋁製 Gasket 架構（減少打字震動）、QMK/Via 完整支援和無線功能，成為追求客製化體驗的主流用戶最佳選擇，穩守第二名。Logitech G915 TKL 的低矮鍵程設計對習慣筆電鍵盤用戶友好，多設備無線切換也是其一大亮點，排名第四。

Ducky One 3 是傳統 Cherry 開關愛好者和 PBT 鍵帽收藏者的首選，以 $149 的中等定價提供最佳熱插拔體驗，排名第五。入門市場由 Keychron K8 Pro 和 HyperX Alloy Origins Core 把持，前者以 QMK 支援勝出，後者則是 $90 以下最硬的選擇。
highlights: Wooting 60HE+ #1：Hall-effect 磁性開關 + 0.1mm Rapid Trigger，競技玩家首選
Keychron Q1 Pro #2：Gasket 架構 + QMK/Via + 無線，客製化入門最佳平衡
SteelSeries Apex Pro TKL Wireless #3：可調節觸發點，無線競技旗艦
Ducky One 3 #5：傳統 Cherry 開關 + 熱插拔，CP 值最高的有線鍵盤
HyperX Alloy Origins Core #12：$89 鋁製全金屬鍵盤，預算段最強建置品質
